card.name: CB01 Small Filter
card.text: When this creature enters, if you sacrificed a permanent this turn, look at the top three cards of your library. You may put one of those cards back on top of your library. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: CB02 Fodder/Aggro
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: CB03 2 Repeated Drain
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a creature, target opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: CB04 3 MV Discard Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: CB05 4 Sac Outlet
card.text: Flying {3}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: CB06 Titanite Demon
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, target opponent hollows. (To hollow, they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: CB07 7 Ariamis Phalanx
card.text: This creature costs {1} less for each creature and artifact card in your graveyard. Swampcycling {2B} ({2B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CB08 4 Mill Husk
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed, then attach this Equipment to it.) Equipped creature gets +2/+1. Whenever equipped creature dies, each player mills two cards. Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: CB09 Hollow Sorcery
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, hollow or pay {4}. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) Exile target creature.

card.name: CB10 Gain Favor
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards and create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CB11 Harmonize Discard
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. Harmonize {7}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: CB12 Discard Spell
card.text: Target opponent hollows twice. (To hollow, they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) Create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: CB13 Fina's Embrace
card.text: Enchant Equipment or creature When this Aura enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls. If enchanted permanent is a creature, it gets +1/+1. If enchanted permanent is an Equipment, it has "Equipped creature gets +1/+1."

card.name: CC01 Oscar, Fading Failure
card.text: When Oscar dies, choose one — • Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. • Create two Soul tokens. (They're enchantments with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CC02 Color fixer
card.text: {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once per turn. {2}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library. If that card was a creature card, you gain 1 life.

card.name: CC03 Harmonize/Coop/Historic Support
CC04 Manalith+ ability
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {4}, {T}: Return up to one permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only if you've dealt combat damage to an opponent this turn.

card.name: CC05 Husk Equipment
CC06 Abandoned Bonfire
card.text: You may have Abandoned Bonfire enter tapped. When you do, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: CG01 1 Cheap Lifegain
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Soul token and you gain 1 life. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CG02 2 MV Bear with Mechanic
card.text: When this creature enters, you may hollow. If you do, destroy target artifact or enchantment. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) {3}{G}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: CG03 2 GY Filter
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, you may exile target card from a graveyard. If you do, you gain 3 life.

card.name: CG04 3 Conditional +1/+1
card.text: Reach At the beginning of your end step, if you cast a spell from anywhere but your hand this turn, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CG05 3 Conditional Landsearcher
card.text: When this creature enters, mill four cards. Put a land card from among the milled cards into your hand. If you can't, create a Treasure token. (To mill four cards, put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.)

card.name: CG06 4 Control Reach
card.text: Reach Whenever you cast a legendary creature or Saga spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CG07 Brutish Mushroom
card.text: Trample Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken permanent, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CG08 5 Value creature
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a historic permanent. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Vigilance Forestcycling {2G} ({2G}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CG09 6 Trample with Upside
card.text: Cooperate {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Trample

card.name: CG10 Disenchant Spell
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: CG11 Bite spell
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. If a creature with flying would be dealt damage this way, destroy it instead. Harmonize {6}{G}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: CG12 Mana acceleration
card.text: Enchant land When this enchantment enters, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of any color.

card.name: CG13 Estus Flask
card.text: This artifact enters with three charge counters on it. {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact: You gain 2 life. When the last charge counter is removed from this artifact, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CR01 1 Haste Upside
card.text: Haste {2}{R}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card and create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: CR02 2 Noncreature Pinger
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: CR03 Depths Lookout
card.text: Cooperate {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Menace

card.name: CR04 3 Exile on ETB
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top two cards of your library. Choose one of them. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: CR05 4 Magma Spider
card.text: Reach {1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Mountaincycling {2R} ({2R}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CR06 4/5 Shock Creature
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, this creature deals 2 damage to target creature.

card.name: CR07 Centipede Demon
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, destroy target artifact that player controls.

card.name: CR08 2 Husk Equipment (haste)
CR09 4 Equipment (big damage)
CR10 Combat trick
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash by paying {2} in addition to its other costs. Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. If you control an equipped creature, draw a card.

card.name: CR11 Rummaging/impulsive draw
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. Harmonize {5}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: CR12 Modal Shatter
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. Modal Shatter deals 1 damage to its controller. • Modal Shatter deals 2 damage to target creature. Destroy up to one target Equipment attached to that creature.

card.name: CR13 Kalameet's Gaze
card.text: Kalameet's Gaze deals 6 damage to target creature. When that creature dies this turn, exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play one of those cards.

card.name: CU01 2 Modal Spell as Creature
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Target creature can't be blocked until end of turn. • Create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CU02 3 Cheap Vigilance
card.text: Vigilance The first time you discard a card each turn, draw a card.

card.name: CU03 Spell Return Creature
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CU04 3 Spell discounter
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. Sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: CU05 Valley Guardian
card.text: Flying Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: CU06 Dragon-Path Scaleward
card.text: Cooperate {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Hexproof

card.name: CU07 Blue Crystal Golem
card.text: When this creature enters, return target nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand. Islandcycling {2U} ({2U}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CU08 Common Counterspell
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If you control a historic permanent, counter that spell unless its controller pays {4} instead. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: CU09 Protective Instant
card.text: Tap target creature, then choose one — • Put two stun counters on that creature. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) • Put a lore counter on target Saga you control.

card.name: CU10 Big Draw Spell
card.text: Draw three cards. Hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: CU11 Unending Whisper
card.text: Draw a card. Harmonize {5}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: CU12 Top or Bottom Spell
card.text: Target creature's owner puts in on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. If you control a historic permanent, you choose instead. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: CU13 Crystal Curse
card.text: Enchant creature or artifact Enchanted creature or artifact is a Treasure artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color," and it loses all other abilities. (If it was a creature, it's no longer a creature.) When enchanted permanent leaves the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: CW01 Apprentice Fire Keeper
card.text: Whenever a creature enters under your control, gain 1 life. {2}{W}, {T}: Create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CW02 Astoran Cleric
card.text: Vigilance When this creature dies, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CW03 3 MV
card.text: {3}{W}, {T}: Tap another target creature. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CW04 3 MV Token Payoff
card.text: Vigilance This creature has +2/+0 as long as a token entered under your control this turn.

card.name: CW05 3 MV Token Creator
card.text: Whenever this creature dies, create two 1/1 Human creature tokens.

card.name: CW06 Hollow Common
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) When this creature enters, destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: CW07 Belltower Gargoyle
card.text: Flying {3}{W}, {T}: Search your library for another creature named Belltower Gargoyle, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: CW08 Balder Knight
card.text: Cooperate {2}{W} ({2}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, untap target nonland permanent.

card.name: CW09 Rest by the Bonfire
card.text: Create three 1/1 white Human creature tokens. You gain 3 life. Plainscycling {2W} ({2W}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CW10 Focused Parry
card.text: Focused Parry deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If excess damage is dealt this way, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CW11 Tranquil Walk of Peace
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: CW12 Husk Common
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed, then attach this Equipment to it.) Equipped creature gets +2/+0. Whenever equipped creature dies, you gain 2 life. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: CW13 Harmonize Disenchant
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Harmonize {5}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: CX01 Upside Flier
card.text: Flying This creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance as long as you control a historic permanent. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: CX02 Looter
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card, then hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: CX03 Dark Grasp
card.text: CX03 Dark Grasp deals 2 damage to target creature. Create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CX04 Cast Dork
card.text: {T}: Add {R} or {G}. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere but your hand, untap this creature.

card.name: CX05 Protection
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. If that creature is equipped or enchanted, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CX06 Humanity Sprites
card.text: Flying {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CX07 Graveyard Card
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) Whenever you hollow, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: CX08 2 MV Conditional 3/3
card.text: Defender As long as you've sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: CX09 Noncreature Trigger
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a Dragon or sorcery spell, this creature deals 1 damage to target creature.

card.name: CX10 Hybrid Cooperator
card.text: Cooperate {RW} ({RW}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) First strike

card.name: UB01 Sac Payoff
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you sacrifice a nonland permanent, this creature deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: UB02 Bonewheel Skeleton
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Whenever you attack, you may pay {B} and hollow. When you do, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: UB03 Knights of Ash
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, you may pay 2 life. If you do, add {C}{C}. Spend this mana only to cast Equipment spells or activate activated abilities of permanents you control.

card.name: UB04 Petrus, Drenched in Sin
card.text: When Petrus, Drenched in Sin enters, choose one or both. If you choose both, you lose 2 life. • Destroy target creature you don't control. • Create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: UB05 Drake Valley Scourge
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the greatest mana value among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: UB06 Frenzied Darkwraiths
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, until end of turn, target creature you control gets +X/+0 and target creature an opponent controls gets -0/-X, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: UB07 Sunlit Madness
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: UB08 Reach of the Abyss
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. Each player hollows. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: UB09 Poison Mist
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature. Harmonize {5}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: UB10 Foil Escape
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {B} or hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) Destroy target creature.

card.name: UB11 Aggressive 1-drop
UC08 Firelink Shrine
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: UC01 Crystal Lizard
card.text: When this creature leaves the battlefield, draw a card. {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: UC02 Lurking Mimic
card.text: Flash When this creature dies, create a Treasure token.

card.name: UC03 Removal
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls. They create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: UC05 Demon's Great Hammer
UG10 Grass Crest Shield
card.text: Equipped creature gets +0/+3, vigilance, and ward {2}. (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Equip {2}

card.name: UG01 Eggburdened Servants
card.text: Deathtouch {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Add two mana of any one color. This mana can't be used to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: UG02 Creature Self-replacer
card.text: Cooperate {1}{G} ({1}{G}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Reach When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: UG03 Soul Generator
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you sacrificed a creature this turn, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: UG04 Return from GY on stick
card.text: When this creature enters, you may hollow. When you do, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: UG05 The Roots of Oolacile
card.text: Bookmark r{3} — {2}{G} (You may cast this spell for its bookmark cost to have it enter with three lore counters on it. Skipped chapters don't trigger.) I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Create two Soul tokens. (They're enchantments with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") II — Create two 1/1 green Fungus creature tokens.

card.name: UG06 Stone Guardian
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: UG07 Taurus Demon
card.text: Trample, haste When this creature enters, destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: UG08 Ashen Hydra
card.text: Reach This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, search your library for a basic land card, put it on the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: UM01 Rhea, Seeker of Kindling
card.text: When Rhea enters, scry 3, then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a historic card, you gain life equal to its mana value, then put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it into your hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: UM02 Pinwheel, Thrice-Masked
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, if Pinwheel entered this turn or you discarded a card this turn, create a 2/2 blue Illusion creature token.

card.name: UM03 Lautrec the Favored
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Whenever a creature you control dies, if it attacked this turn, Lautrec deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: UM04 Izalith Firesage
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast a spell, this creature deals 1 damage to any target. If that spell was cast from anywhere but your hand, this creature deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: UM05 Siegmeyer, Honor-Bound Coward
card.text: Vigilance Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on Siegmeyer, put a +1/+1 counter up to one other target creature. When Siegmeyer dies, you gain life equal to its power.

card.name: UM06 Darkmoon Knightess, Fire Keeper
card.text: Darkmoon Knightess has first strike during your turn. At the beginning of your end step, if a creature left the battlefield this turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: UM07 Asylum Jailor
card.text: Vigilance, reach When this creature enters, mill four cards, then you may put a creature card or land card from among the milled cards on top of your library.

card.name: UM08 Alvina, Darkroot Mother
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, choose one — • Put a lore counter on or remove a lore counter from target Saga you control. (Removing lore counters doesn't cause chapter abilities to trigger.) • Draw a card.

card.name: UM09 Valley Stormkite
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, choose one — • This creature deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two targets. • Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UM10 Solaire, Sunlight Knight
card.text: Cooperate {R}{W} ({R}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) First strike Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: UM11 Tale of the Painted World
card.text: Bookmark r{3} — {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for its bookmark cost to have it enter with three lore counters on it. Skipped chapters don't trigger.) I — Create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying. II — Add {W}{U}. Spend this mana only to cast historic spells. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) III — Exile up to one target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: UM12 Artorias Falls
card.text: Bookmark r{4} — {3}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell for its bookmark cost to have it enter with four lore counters on it. Skipped chapters don't trigger.) I, II, III, IV — Draw a card, then hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) Return up to one creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. ​

card.name: UM13 The Undead Curse
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Creatures you control with decayed have haste.

card.name: UM14 Nurturing Chaos
card.text: Choose one— • Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. • Nurturing Chaos deals 3 damage to any target. Harmonize {4}{R}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: UM15 Kindle the Flame
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") Whenever you put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control, you may draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: UM16 Oswald, Velka's Arbiter
card.text: When Oswald enters, target opponent discards a card. If they discard a creature card this way, create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying. {2}, Sacrifice another creature: You gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: UM17 Maneater Mildred
card.text: When Maneater Mildred enters, you may hollow. If you do, draw a card. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) Trample Maneater Mildred's power is equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: UM18 The Wolf Knight's Legacy
card.text: Bookmark r{3} — {1}{G} (You may cast this spell for its bookmark cost to have it enter with three lore counters on it. Skipped chapters don't trigger.) Create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. I — Return target creature to its owner's hand. II — Return up to one historic permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: UM19 The Duke's Great Sorceries
card.text: Bookmark r{3} — {2}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell for its bookmark cost to have it enter with three lore counters on it. Skipped chapters don't trigger.) I — Create two 1/1 blue Human Wizard creature tokens with prowess. II — Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. III — Add {U}{R}. If you spend this mana on a Dragon or sorcery spell, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Copies of permanents are tokens.)

card.name: UM20 Jolly Cooperation!
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 2/2 white Human Knight creature token. Whenever you activate a cooperate ability, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: UR01 Hollowing Mercenaries
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: UR03 Batwing Demon
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: UR04 Dragonpath Hunter
card.text: Whenever you pay this card's cooperate cost, and when this creature enters, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Cooperate {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Haste

card.name: UR05 Burg Capra
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 2/1 black Dog creature token with haste and decayed. It attacks this turn if able. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: UR06 Attacker buffer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks with one or more other creatures, another attacking creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where is the number of attacking creatures.

card.name: UR08 In The Firstborn's Footsteps
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw a card and create a 1/1 red Dragon creature token with flying and "{1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn."

card.name: UR09 Blazing Breath
card.text: Blazing Breath deals 1 damage to each creature you don't control. Harmonize {R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: UR10 Chaos Blade
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 colorless Human creature token with decayed, then attach this Equipment to it.) Equipped creature has +1/+0. Whenever equipped creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target. Equip {2}

card.name: UU01 New Londo Haunted
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, tap target permanent. {3}{U}: Draw a card, then hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: UU02 Beatrice, Seeker of Sorceries
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") When this creature dies, return up to one sorcery card with mana value less than or equal to this card's power from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UU03 0-Power Creature
card.text: {1}{U}: This creature gets +2/-2 until end of turn. At the beginning of your end step, if a creature you control left the battlefield this turn, mill three cards. Return up to one historic card milled this way to your hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: UU04 Dragon/Sorcery Unblockable
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever you cast a Dragon or sorcery spell, this creature can't be blocked until end of turn.

card.name: UU05 Flash Trick Creature
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. At the beginning of your end step, you may discard a card. When you do, draw a card.

card.name: UU06 Valley Windkite
card.text: Flying The first time you cast a spell each turn, scry 2. If that spell was a Dragon or sorcery spell, scry 2, then draw a card.

card.name: UU08 Creature counterspell
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or hollow. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.) Counter target creature spell. If you paid this spell's additional cost, instead counter target spell.

card.name: UU09 Modal Spell
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may discard a card. Choose one. If you paid this spell's additional cost, choose both — • Draw two cards. • Put up to two lore counters on or remove up to two lore counters from among Sagas you control.

card.name: UU10 Just Another Undead
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: UU11 The Great Flood
card.text: Bookmark r{3} — {1}{U} (You may cast this spell for its bookmark cost to have it enter with three lore counters on it. Skipped chapters don't trigger.) I, II, III — Tap target creature an opponent controls. Put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Return target tapped creature to its owner's hand. Draw a card. ​

card.name: UW01 Aggressive 1-drop
card.text: Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, it gains first strike until end of turn. This ability triggers only once per turn, and only on your turn.

card.name: UW02 Go-Wide Payoff
card.text: Lifelink Whenever this creature or another creature you control enters, another target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: UW03 The Crestfallen Warrior
card.text: When The Crestfallen Warrior enters, create a Soul token. (It's an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") {1}, Hollow: The Crestfallen Warrior gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. (To hollow, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.)

card.name: UW04 OPT Draw
card.text: Vigilance Whenever one or more creatures you control die, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: UW05 Historic Searcher
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a historic card or basic land card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: UW06 Double Striker
card.text: Cooperate {W}{W} ({W}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Double strike

card.name: UW07 Tarkus, Black Iron Champion
card.text: Cooperate {2}{W} ({2}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and it gains the following abilities until end of turn. You may cast this card on a later turn from exile.) Vigilance Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile up to one target artifact or enchantment they control.

card.name: UW08 Gwyn's Silver Knights
card.text: Reach At the beginning of combat on each turn, if a creature entered under your control this turn but wasn't cast from your hand, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: UW09 Cheap Recursion
card.text: Choose one or two target creature or artifact cards with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If you choose two cards this way, sacrifice a creature or artifact. Then, return the chosen cards to the battlefield.

card.name: UW10 Removal with downside
card.text: Destroy target creature. Its controller creates two Soul tokens. (They're enchantments with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: UW11 Cheap Equipment
UW12 Miracle: Magic Barrier
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this Aura enters, untap target creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: UX02 Crow Demons
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: UX04 Bite spell
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. Harmonize {5}{RG}{RG} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by {X}, where X is its power. Then exile this spell.)

card.name: UX05 Fire Keeper Anastacia
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, create a Soul token. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic. A Soul token is an enchantment with "{1}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: UX07 Buyback
card.text: Sacrifice a permanent, then return up to two target permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand, then

card.name: UX08 Dusk, Displaced Princess
card.text: When UX08 Dusk enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an instant, sorcery or Saga card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. {GU}, Sacrifice UX08 Dusk: Return target instant, sorcery or Saga card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UX10 Coop & Soul Supporter
card.text: Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters a creature you control, another target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
